comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Optimizer winner review selected five clear Suco promotion targets: Annual Income AI -> f98a14a2-2c8b-4278-86d1-37a235d884a5, Blind Transfer- AI -> cc4747cf-1023-4b23-9c88-bbabb6bc1f40, Customer Questions AI -> a850f29c-2f08-4f2b-92f7-71b7aa7e8ad6, Misleading AI -> fc95800b-f0cc-4e83-9ae6-a6cfa5463004, Project Type AI -> c0549e4b-da3c-4f25-9c83-c226a369f289. Excluding candidates from runs with no winning/success signal or poor alignment.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Promoted five best-aligned Suco optimizer versions to champion via CLI MCP harness. Verified all five score records now point to the expected new champion versions and championHistory contains the closed previous-champion entry plus the open new-champion entry.
